page: Microsoft Azure DC8ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCADSv5 family. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 307 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for integration with premium storage options. It does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio offer predictable resource density for general-purpose workloads. The inclusion of local storage and premium storage capabilities makes this server type appropriate for relational databases, web serving, and general-purpose application hosting that requires dedicated compute resources without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the DCADSv5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. Storage capabilities include 307 GB of local disk space alongside premium storage compatibility. This instance does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density provide predictable performance for general-purpose workloads. This hardware profile is appropriate for applications such as relational databases, web servers, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and local storage capacity.
